comments.160F:018A: test bit 0x03: call main_movement every 4th iteration
comments.160F:13D8: reads port 0x3DA, tests bit 3 (vsync). ZF=1 when NOT in vsync. Emulator always returns 0x00 -> ZF always 1
comments.160F:04AB: call vsync_check; jnz: loop while IN vsync (wait for vsync end). Emulator: jnz never fires, falls through immediately
comments.160F:0B8B: call vsync_check; jnz 0x0B8B: loop while IN vsync (wait for vsync end). Emulator: falls through immediately
comments.160F:0B90: call vsync_check; jz 0x0B90: loop while NOT in vsync (wait for vsync start). BUG: emulator 0x3DA=0 -> infinite loop if reached
comments.160F:1942: call vsync_check; jnz 0x193c: skip window check if in vsync. Emulator: jnz never fires -> window check always runs (too fast but not blocked)
comments.160F:195F: cmp [0x057b], 0x60 -- cat must be at/above window level (Y <= 0x60)
comments.160F:1A26: mov [0x1673], al -- set cat_building_floor from [0x1668] (target floor)
comments.160F:1B30: cmp [0x057b], 0x60; jnb: requires Y STRICTLY < 0x60 for window entry
comments.160F:5522: mov si, 3 -- default si=3 (fast mode, overrides below)
comments.160F:553C: jnz: if state!=0 keep si=1 (player mode)
comments.160F:553F: cmp cat_building_floor [0x1673], 0 -- 0=cat on ground, non-zero=floor in building
comments.160F:5544: jz: [0x1673]==0 -> si stays 0 (cat on ground, auto-scroll; player input ignored by scroll)
comments.160F:555C: cmp elapsed vs threshold [di+0x59F2]: di=0->3 ticks (attract), di=4->player in-building speed
comments.160F:5560: jnb: elapsed >= threshold -> proceed with scroll
comments.160F:5562: ret: not enough time elapsed, skip this frame
comments.160F:5B28: programs PIT channel 2 (port 0x42) for PC speaker sound -- NOT channel 0
comments.160F:5D1F: mov [0x057b], 0x60 -- attract-mode DEMO: place cat at window height
comments.160F:5D54: attract-mode loop: polls [0x0693] for any key press to exit
comments.160F:5E1C: call vsync_check (0x13D8); emulator always returns 0 -> ZF=1 -> always jumps to ret
comments.160F:5E1F: jz 0x5E2A: BUG - port 0x3DA always 0, so vsync-gated movement block is never executed
comments.160F:5E2A: ret -- attract_cat_ai always returns here (movement block skipped due to vsync bug)
comments.160F:1B7F: jnz: if state!=0 skip attract mode check
comments.160F:1B88: jz: return immediately -- [0x1673]==0, cat still in alley
comments.160F:14B3: IRQ1 handler: reads scan code from port 0x60, updates key state table; increments [0x0693] on any keydown
comments.160F:1835: level setup: initializes [0x1673]=0 (cat on ground), [0x592A]=0x0500 (scroll counter)
comments.160F:2E10: seed LFSR from PIT ch0 counter; fallback 0xFA59 if counter reads zero
